# From the Grounds of Humility

## Scripture

"So God created mankind in his own image, in the image of God he created them; male and female he created them." - Genesis 1:27

## Reflection

As I prepare my morning coffee, I'm reminded of the process of extraction – the slow and intentional pulling of flavors from the grounds. It requires patience, attention, and a willingness to let go of my expectations. Just as the perfect cup is a result of allowing the coffee to steep in the right conditions, so too must I allow God to shape me in His image. The aroma of humility wafts through my life as I surrender to His will, trusting that He sees the best in me, even when I don't. The crema of His presence forms on the surface of my soul as I submit to His gentle refining. I'm not the master brewer, but the one who submits to the Master's touch.

## Prayer

We pray for the patience to let go, the faith to trust, and the humility to be shaped by Your image, dear Lord.

## One-Line Application

As we brew our lives, may we remember that true flavor comes from surrender to God's gentle refining.
